$comment: c14 shipped <errno.h>: the errno object-macro (-> (*__errno_location())) + the __errno_location libc symbol (dynamic libc.so.6) + the E* constants. `errno = EINVAL; errno == 22` witnesses macro lvalue/rvalue + constant value + the libc call → exit 42 on a real Linux runtime. Two elf targets (POSIX header gated availableObjectFormats:[elf] — Linux is the WSL run target; no pe/macho arm: errno on macOS uses __error + different values, a c14-macOS follow-on). Runs natively on linux-gcc + native arm64 CI legs; cross-compiles (compile-checks the descriptor) locally. The release arm runs the optimizer over the macro-expanded deref/call. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop any surface → errno/EINVAL/__errno_location undefined → compile fails.
